testsuite.name: DemoQA Alerts, Frames and Browser Windows
Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content
testsuite.error: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'by id or name "browserWindowsMenuItem"' (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:230) at org.utility.UtilityClass.clickButton(UtilityClass.java:79) at org.stepdefinition.DemoQA_BrowserWindowSteps.userClicksOnMenuItem(DemoQA_BrowserWindowSteps.java:66) at ✽.User clicks on "Browser Windows" menu item(file:///D:/IdealTechLabs/DemoQATask/src/test/resources/Features/DemoQA_BrowserWindows.feature:35) Caused by: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"css selector","selector":"*[name='browserWindowsMenuItem']"} (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.57) For documentation on this error, please visit: testcase.name: user navigates to DemoQA Browser Windows page
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: User clicks on "Alerts, Frame & Windows" in the left panel
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: User clicks on "Browser Windows" menu item
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: User clicks the "New Tab" button
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: A new tab should open with the expected URL
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: The new tab should display the heading "This is a sample page"
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: User switches back to the original tab
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: The original tab should still display the Browser Windows page
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content
